refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the 2D or 3D length/perimeter of a lon/lat geometry on a spheroid.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Calculates the length or perimeter of a geometry on a spheroid. This is useful if the coordinates of the geometry are in longitude/latitude and a length is desired without reprojection. The spheroid is specified by a text value as follows:
Changed: 2.2.0 In prior versions this was called ST_Length_Spheroid and had the alias ST_3DLength_Spheroid

refsection.title: Examples
